title: Monitoring and SLO stack decision track

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

tuw_evidence.title: Monitoring stack decision brief

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... count MON-CAND and SLO-SIGNAL rows; verify blocked decision state and no progress-control-room change ... NODE
commands.purpose: Verify the T01 brief compares at least two candidates and preserves monitoring decision boundaries
Verify candidate stack and required signal row counts
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: This is a monitoring-stack decision brief only; no monitoring provider, alert route, dashboard, SLO threshold set, or runtime configuration is selected.
The progress control room has pre-existing unrelated local changes, but this TUW did not edit it and treats it as a development dashboard to preserve.
LT-L3-W06 remains open because T01 requires owner-selected stack evidence and T02-T04 require runtime monitoring and alert proof.

tuw_evidence.title: Operations dashboard definition draft

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... count OPS-PANEL, LOG-QUERY, DASH-EV rows and verify no infra/progress-control-room artifacts were changed by this TUW ... NODE
commands.purpose: Verify the T02 dashboard definition includes required panels and log slots without claiming runtime monitoring

commands.command: grep -c "^| OPS-PANEL-" docs/launch/l3/operations-dashboard-definition.md && grep -c "^| LOG-QUERY-" docs/launch/l3/operations-dashboard-definition.md && grep -c "^| DASH-EV-" docs/launch/l3/operations-dashboard-definition.md
commands.purpose: Verify dashboard panel, log query, and evidence slot row counts
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: This is an operations dashboard definition only; no collector, live dashboard, staging log query, or alert route was created.
The definition includes p95 latency and error-rate panels required by LT-L3-W06-T02 acceptance, but they remain pending runtime telemetry.
The progress control room has pre-existing unrelated local changes and was not modified by this TUW.

tuw_evidence.title: SLO definition and alert-rule draft

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... count SLO-DEF and ALERT-RULE rows; verify candidate-only thresholds and no alert receipt claim ... NODE
commands.purpose: Verify the T03 SLO draft has six mapped SLO/alert rows without claiming approval or alert delivery

commands.command: grep -c "^| SLO-DEF-" docs/launch/l3/slo-definition.md && grep -c "^| ALERT-RULE-" docs/launch/l3/slo-definition.md
commands.purpose: Verify SLO and alert mapping row counts
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: The six SLO thresholds are candidate starting values only and require owner approval or modification before T03 can pass.
No alert rule was configured and no alert receipt was produced.
The SLO draft links to the T02 dashboard definition but remains blocked until runtime telemetry and monitoring stack selection exist.

tuw_evidence.title: 감사 체인 무결성 일일 검증 job 구축
tuw_evidence.objective: WORM 스토어 대상 해시체인 검증이 일 1회 자동 실행되고 실패 시 알림이 발화한다.
acceptance_criteria: 스케줄 등록 조회 출력(일 1회 표현식)이 보존된다.
job 수동 1회 실행 exit 0 + 검증 대상 레코드 수 출력.
체인 손상 시뮬레이션(스테이징 사본)에서 job이 실패를 검출하고 알림 발화 기록 1건이 남는다.

verification_contract.method: 1) 스케줄 조회 출력 2) job 실행 exit 0·레코드 수 출력 3) 손상 사본 실행 → 비0 exit + 알림 기록

tuw_evidence.blocked_reason: This TUW is represented for coverage only. Required deliverables and acceptance criteria remain blocked or pending until real evidence or owner-approved deferral coverage exists.

tuw_evidence.title: W06 모니터링/SLO 증거 조립(G6 기여분)
tuw_evidence.objective: SLO 대시보드·알림 실발화·일일 검증 job 증거가 G6 차원(SLO 대시보드+알림 실발화)으로 조립된다.
acceptance_criteria: G6 매핑에 'SLO 대시보드'와 '알림 실발화' 두 행이 각각 T02·T03 증거 경로를 인용한다.
command-evidence.json 귀속 키가 T01~T04 4건이며 값 전건에 exit code 또는 카운트가 포함된다.
일일 검증 job의 손상 검출 기록(T04)이 패키지에 동봉된다.

verification_contract.method: 1) 매핑 행 인용 경로 존재 검사 2) command-evidence.json 파싱 — 키 4건·값 형식 검사
